items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Rises As Market Takes a Dip: Key Facts
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) ended the recent trading session at $77.07, demonstrating a +1.76% change from the preceding day's closing price. Shares have appreciated by 27.51% over the course of the past month.

items.headline: RBC Cuts Price Target on Albemarle to $166 From $257, Keeps Outperform Rating
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $207.56, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

items.headline: BofA Securities Adjusts Price Target on Albemarle to $155 From $225, Maintains Buy Rating
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $207.56, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

items.headline: Albemarle Stock Loses 25% in a Month: What Should Investors Do Now?
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation's ALB shares have tumbled 25.5% in the past month, underperforming the Zacks Chemical - Diversified industry and the S&P 500's declines of 6.7% and 0.1%, respectively. Falling lithium market prices are weighing on the ALB stock lately.

items.headline: Lithium Is on the Rise Again. Does That Make Albemarle a Buy?
items.snippet: Albemarle has pivoted from a pure growth mindset to a stricter focus on operational efficiency. In the first quarter, Albemarle reported sales of $1.4 billion, up 33% year over year, driven mainly by higher pricing and volume in energy storage.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs, RBC Capital Markets said.
